# `mobile_listInstalledApps`

Returns a JSON object ({"appIds":[...]}) listing the app ids/bundle ids installed on the current mobile device. Works on Android and iOS.

## Source

- Kind: class-backed
- Class: `xyz.block.trailblaze.mobile.tools.ListInstalledAppsTrailblazeTool`
